creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
This version is a maintenance release and contains bug fixes as well as
various improvements for the day-to-day administration of a TYPO3
website (Extension Manager and management of reference index).

http://typo3.org/news/article/typo3-cms-6213-released

- Test: http://www.charlieroot.de/FreeBSD/PRs/build_www_typo3-lts_2015-06-11-20-59.log
- Diff: http://www.charlieroot.de/FreeBSD/PRs/build_www_typo3-lts_2015-06-11-20-59.diff
